form.formComment: Won two starts back over 435m at Sale. Last start he finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on March 31 over 400m at this track behind Nova Rose beaten one length (22.90). Draw likely to suit. Going well and can bounce back to winning form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 400m in 22.84. Followed that up with a minor placing over 400m at this track at Grade 5 a week-and-a-half ago. Hasn't been far away. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at Bendigo when only half a length from the winner but did record a slick 24.00 over the 425m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 3rd over 400m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (22.84) behind Dr. Benedict in a Special conditions Veteran race on March 31. Has won three races from this draw. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but had to settle for a minor placing when a 5.5 lengths third over 400m at this track, clocking 22.88. Has clocked a superb 22.53 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.50) when fifth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Starts from box 6 for the first time here. Looking to others.
